title: Invis Frames
description: Toggles item frame visibility on click.
body:
# What is this plugin?
Simplistic plugin that toggles the visibility of item frames on crouch-click.

# Features
- Click an item frame while crouched to toggle its visibility.
- Permission node to decide who can toggle them. `invisibleframes.toggle`

The current version of the plugin was intentionally kept simple to reduce the likelihood of it breaking between different Minecraft versions.

# Setup:
- Download the jar file.
- Place the file into your server's plugin folder.
- Start the server and Enjoy!

## Stats:
https://bstats.org/plugin/bukkit/InvisibleFrames

![https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/InvisibleFrames.svg](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/InvisibleFrames.svg)
